markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content production, review feedback, and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**GSC/GA4 access is blocked,** preventing a Looker dashboard that tracks key metrics, including LLM referral traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**A 130-term procurement glossary is proposed** to build semantic authority and attract LLM traffic; each term will be a \~600-800 word page.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [**The "What is risk supplier management?" draft is ready for review;** the "calibration" article was updated with a more direct tone based on Spencer's feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [**Complex AI-generated images are a challenge;** content will be published without them to gather early traffic signals, with visuals added later.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

## Topics

### Blocked: GSC & GA4 Access

  - [GrowthX needs GSC & GA4 access to build a Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Purpose:** The dashboard will track key metrics, including a breakdown of LLM referral traffic (by LLM and webpage).](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [**Status:** Ben has re-pinged IT; GrowthX will also follow up on Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Production & Review

  - [**Production Cadence:** 3 articles this week, 5 next week.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Review Items:**](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [**"Calibration" Article:** Updated with a more direct tone based on Spencer's feedback. Ben will review the revised draft.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [**"What is risk supplier management?" Article:** New draft ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [**Process Clarifications:**](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** GrowthX will add links automatically and manually before publication.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**TLDRs:** Will be added to all future articles.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
      - [**Content Refresh:** SEO articles should be refreshed annually.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

### AI-Generated Images

  - [**Challenge:** AI struggles with the complex, infographic-style images requested.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)
  - [**Interim Solution:** Publish articles without images to gather early traffic signals, then add visuals later.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [**Manual Backup:** Sydney created a simple infographic for the "calibration" article using a separate tool.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Glossary Project

  - [**Proposal:** Create a 130-term procurement glossary, sourced from the Institute of Procurement and Supply.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [**Format:** Each term will be a separate page (\~600-800 words) to build semantic authority and avoid Google's "thin content" penalty.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [**SEO Rationale:** Builds topical authority, which helps attract LLM traffic. LLMs favor "answer-rich" sites (e.g., Wikipedia), a status a comprehensive glossary can help achieve.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ben:**](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
      - [Re-ping IT for GSC/GA4 access.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Review the revised "calibration" article.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [Review the new "What is risk supplier management?" article.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
      - [Begin approving/rejecting glossary terms in the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [Ping IT on Slack regarding GSC/GA4 access.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Keep Ben updated on AI image generation progress.](https://fathom.video/share/V3_nyucbFyx-czJTXefDM4ptattZF7sm?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
